title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official CLI and Python/JS libraries for downloading, running and chatting with GGUF LLMs locally.

title: ollama-python
summary: First-party Python SDK that wraps the Ollama REST API for easy model loading and chat completions.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Node and browsers with promise & stream APIs.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration package exposing Ollama models as standard LangChain LLMs and embedders.

title: ollama-webui (ollama-webui/ollama-webui)
summary: Feature-rich web UI for Ollama (chat, PDF, RAG, multi-user) installable via Docker or pip.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client library wrapping the Ollama REST API with async and streaming support.

title: ollama-rb
summary: Ruby gem providing idiomatic client methods for chat, embeddings and model management.

title: ollama-cli (adamgoose/ollama-cli)
summary: Community-enhanced Go CLI adding progress bars, config profiles and shell completion to the official binary.

title: ollama-copilot (cmungall/ollama-copilot)
summary: Experimental GitHub Copilot-style code-completion plugin using Ollama hosted models.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration by deepset-ai letting you use Ollama models in Haystack pipelines.

title: ollama-cookbook
summary: Community recipes for deploying, benchmarking and extending Ollama with Docker, K8s, GPU stacks, etc.

title: ollama-docker
summary: Official Docker image and compose files for running Ollama server with CPU/GPU variants.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Community-maintained Helm chart for deploying Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU autoscaling.

title: ollama-chat (npm)
summary: Lightweight npm package exposing a React hook for streaming chat with an Ollama backend.

title: ollama-py on PyPI
summary: Official PyPI listing for ollama-python with quick-start snippets and version history.

title: ollama-rs
summary: Rust crate providing strongly-typed async bindings to the Ollama REST API.

title: ollama-rag (langchain-ai)
summary: Ready-to-hack RAG template using Ollama embeddings + ChatOllama with Chroma vector store.

title: ollama-discord-bot
summary: Python Discord bot that lets users chat with any local Ollama model via slash commands.

title: ollama-slack-bot
summary: Go-based Slack bot that streams Ollama responses into threads with optional code highlighting.
